name: Kaito Kensei
bio: Embracing individuality as the cornerstone of human dignity.

name: Lila Luminari
bio: Celebrating diversity and creativity as the driving force behind human progress.
speech_style: Melodic whispers, like the rustling of leaves

name: Taro Takahashi
bio: Upholding individuality as the fundamental right to shape one's own destiny.
speech_style: Direct, no-nonsense tone, like a sharp sword

name: Lila Lotusblume
bio: Thinks that the lost legends hold the key to understanding the present. Seeks to revive the spirit of New Genesis 300.
